mainEntity.name: How calculate lost wages on-the-job injury West Valley City?
mainEntity.text: How calculate lost wages on-the-job injury West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66 2/3% average weekly wage up to state max $950/week 2026.[18]

suggestedAnswer.text: West Valley City AWW based highest 4 prior quarters cap adjusts yearly. Overtime included partial disability prorated. Disputes over calculation common—pay stubs prove accurate AWW.[18]

name: Calculating Lost Wages Work Injury West Valley
description: 66 2/3% average weekly wage up to state max $950/week 2026.[18]
